node_6.subject: Francisco Lopez
node_6.description: This is Francisco Lopez's plan for Friday February 13: wake up and complete the morning routine at 8:00 am, continue with some script writing for the web series from 9:00 am to 11:00 am, attend an improvisational comedy class from 11:30 am to 1:30 pm, have lunch and relax from 1:30 pm to 2:30 pm, work on rehearsals for the web series from 3:00 pm to 5:00 pm, prepare and have dinner around 6:00 pm, take some time for leisure activities such as watching a comedy show or reading from 7:00 pm to 8:30 pm, brainstorm new ideas for upcoming performances or sketches from 8:30 pm to 10:00 pm.
